title: cuscuta longiloba
intro: Cuscuta longiloba, also known as Aschyrocoma longiloba, is a type of parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the dodder family (Convolvulaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta longiloba include its ability to improve fertility, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system. Cuscuta longiloba can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
